description: Combined CLI for Prisjakt and PriceRunner with cross-site arbitrage, price-drop digests, and EAN-keyed lookups

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.value: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

tools.name: pricerunner_category
tools.description: Browse a PriceRunner category. ID and slug come from the /cl/ URL pattern. Required: id, slug. Returns the PriceRunnerCategory.

tools.name: pricerunner_deals
tools.description: List PriceRunner curated deals. Returns array of PriceRunnerDeal.

tools.name: pricerunner_product
tools.description: Get PriceRunner product detail. ID path is the <group>-<numeric>/<category>/<slug>-priser segment (e.g., 1-3208336567/Mobiltelefoner/Apple-iPhone-15-Pro-Max-256GB-Natural-Titanium-priser). Required: id. Returns the PriceRunnerProduct.

tools.name: pricerunner_search
tools.description: Search PriceRunner products by name. Returns the search results from initial_payload. Required: query.

tools.name: prisjakt_category
tools.description: Browse a Prisjakt category page. Returns the productCollection from window.__REACT_QUERY_STATE__. Required: slug. Optional: brand.

tools.name: prisjakt_product
tools.description: Get Prisjakt product detail by ID. Returns the full product object including offers, ratings, brand, category, and badges. Required: id.

tools.name: prisjakt_search
tools.description: Search Prisjakt products by name. Returns the matching product list. Required: query.
